log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Harengon — Iron Concentration --- HP: 32/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
